goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should serve 'chinese' food.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'area'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'boat' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve chinese food
Make sure you get address and area
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of boat and should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee
